---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a scoped ChromaLab improvement.
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

What should ChromaLab improve?

## User Value

Who benefits?

- [ ] Student
- [ ] Educator
- [ ] Researcher
- [ ] Developer
- [ ] Maintainer

## Area

- [ ] Android UI
- [ ] Capture/import
- [ ] Graph/layout detection
- [ ] Axis/calibration
- [ ] Trace/peak analysis
- [ ] Report/export
- [ ] Local AI/model runtime
- [ ] Security/privacy
- [ ] Documentation

## Evidence Or Context

Describe the use case. Do not include private chromatogram images or sensitive
logs unless they have been reviewed and redacted.

## Scientific Boundary Check

Could this feature affect chromatographic numeric metrics or report gates?

- [ ] No
- [ ] Yes, and it needs validation/gate updates

If yes, describe the required evidence or tests.
